role: Friday Prayer Imam of Mashhad; representative of Supreme Leader in Razavi Khorasan
bio: Ahmad Alam al-Huda is the hardline Friday Prayer Imam of Mashhad, appointed by [Ali Khamenei](/people/ali-khamenei) as his personal representative in Razavi Khorasan Province. He is the father-in-law of [Ebrahim Raisi](/people/ebrahim-raisi) — Raisi married his daughter Jamileh Alamolhoda. He supervised Saeed Jalili's doctoral dissertation at Imam Sadeq University, and his sermons from Mashhad's Friday prayer platform have long served as a barometer of the hardliner wing's positions on domestic and foreign policy.
editorial_notes: Born 1947. Father-in-law of Ebrahim Raisi. Supervised Saeed Jalili's PhD dissertation. Representative of Khamenei in Razavi Khorasan since 1994.
